memory: Repository-history reconciliation requires two independent surfaces: a declared witness and independently retrieved path/blob/history evidence. Schema validity or a self-reported discovery_complete flag cannot establish exhaustive coverage.

observed: CM-1018 committed a schema separating path discovery from semantic classification.
The new validator and deterministic tests are committed.
inferred: Without an independent eligible-path set, an internally consistent witness can omit files while appearing complete.
proposed: Run the committed Node tests, then connect an authenticated paginated history collector to the validator.
superseded: Treating discovery_complete=true as sufficient evidence of exhaustive reconciliation.
unresolved: No runtime execution was observed in this run.
Immutable originating sources for M-004, M-005, and M-006 remain unlocated pending complete traversal.

privacy_boundary: Public repository governance metadata only; excludes private chat, health data, credentials, personal identifiers, and unreviewed uploads.
falsification_route: Execute the tests and feed the validator a complete authenticated traversal; any omitted path, duplicate, digest drift, unreachable horizon, or unclassified entry must fail closed.
